AI.summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. AI.title: South Korea’s hottest new bachelors are chip workers
AI.summary: Baek, a 35-year-old manager at the South Korean semiconductor titan SK Hynix, was enrolled in Sunoo, a matchmaking company based in Seoul, a year ago. In a move typical of anxious South Korean parents, his mother signed him up, hoping to find a good wife for her son. Lately, says Baek (who asked to …

AI.title: I spy

But after binge-watching two seasons of Netflix's A Man on the Inside, this is perhaps the first time I've seen Hollywood, perhaps inadvertently, illustrate the biggest cultural problem with smart g…

AI.title: Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees
AI.summary: A year after cutting around 9,100 employees, Microsoft is making further layoffs today as it begins its new financial year. The software maker is laying off around 4,800 employees today, approximately 2.1 percent of its workforce. Most of the employees affected by today's cuts are in Microsoft's com…

游戏.title: GKIDS Reveals 3 New Collector’s Editions of Beloved Films and Blu-ray Remaster of Hideaki Anno’s Love & Pop at Anime Expo 2026
游戏.summary: Media distributor GKIDS announced four new home video releases "built specifically for collectors" during its 2026 Anime Expo panel.

游戏.title: Meccha Chameleon Hits an Astonishing 15 Million Sales, Teases Collaboration With Famous Japanese Star — and Fans Have Theories for Who It Might Be
游戏.summary: Skyrocketing Japanese indie hit Meccha Chameleon just surpassed 15 million sales, despite launching on Steam less than a month ago. Now, the paint-and-seek multiplayer game is getting a collaboration with a well-known Japanese star, and fans are abuzz with excitement over who it might be.

游戏.title: U.S. Helps Vietnam Arrest 7 People Allegedly Involved in One of the Largest and Most Popular Free Streaming Sites for Anime
游戏.summary: HiAnime was one of the largest and most popular free streaming sites for anime until its sudden closure earlier this year. Now, authorities in Vietnam have arrested seven people allegedly involved in the pirate site’s operation, as reported by Torrent Freak.

游戏.title: Pokémon Go Hosting Major 10th Anniversary Broadcast This Week
游戏.summary: Pokémon Go will hold a very special 10th anniversary broadcast this Thursday, July 9 — with details on what it will contain currently top secret.

游戏.title: The Elder Scrolls Online Has Reportedly Lost 'As Much as Half' of Its Development Team as Its Roadmap Is Being Re-Evaluated
游戏.summary: New reports indicate that half of the team working on The Elder Scrolls Online has been laid off, leaidng many to wonder how the game will continue.

游戏.title: 'We Need to Change Course' — Bethesda Boss Tells Staff the Company Must Focus on 'Our Strongest Franchises' as Xbox Layoffs Hit Hard
游戏.summary: The boss of Bethesda has told staff the company must now focus on its “strongest franchises” amid sweeping layoffs across Xbox.

游戏.title: Undead Labs Reportedly Won't Be Required to Bring State of Decay 3 to Xbox Game Pass After Microsoft Sale
游戏.summary: As Undead Labs continues development on State of Decay 3 under new ownership, it sounds like the zombie survival sequel won't be required to be on Xbox Game Pass.

游戏.title: Fans Mourn Starfield Amid Xbox Layoffs, With Bethesda Now Seemingly Focused on Fallout, Elder Scrolls, Wolfenstein, Doom, and Quake
游戏.summary: You probably shouldn't bet on a Starfield sequel if news coming out of Xbox's reset is anything to go by.

游戏.title: As Xbox Tries to Sell or Close Arkane, the Future of Marvel's Blade Remains Unclear, With Reports Suggesting It Was Delayed Internally and Is Running Over Budget
游戏.summary: The future of Marvel’s Blade remains unclear as Microsoft tries to sell or close its developer, Arkane Lyon.

游戏.title: Nintendo Switch Consoles Will No Longer Be Sold From Mid-February 2027 Onwards — at Least in Europe
游戏.summary: After almost a decade on sale, Nintendo will no longer sell its original Switch console — including Switch Lite and Switch OLED models — from mid-February 2027 onwards in Europe.

游戏.title: Double Fine and Compulsion Confirm Status Following Xbox Cuts, Get to Keep Franchises Such as Psychonauts and South of Midnight
游戏.summary: Double Fine and Compulsion Games have issued public statements to confirm their status following word of today's enormous cuts by Xbox, discussing their respective futures as independent studios.

游戏.title: The Most Significant Restructure in Xbox History: Live Report
游戏.summary: There is a lot of news flooding in around the Xbox layoffs, including staff, studio, and game changes. We reported on it all right here.

游戏.title: Xbox Boss Asha Sharma Announces 3,200 Layoffs, Including 1,600 Today, With 4 Studios Leaving for New Management — Read the Email to Staff in Full
游戏.summary: Microsoft has announced 3,200 staff are set to lose their jobs at Xbox across the current financial year, with 1,600 of those layoffs happening today, July 6. As part of the restructure, four studios are leaving Xbox to new management, and one is now in consultation over its future.

游戏.title: New Nintendo Switch 2 Announced for Europe This Fall: Will Be Slightly Heavier, But With User-Replaceable Batteries
游戏.summary: Nintendo's new Switch 2 model for Europe will roll out this fall, with user-replaceable batteries that make the console slightly heavier.

游戏.title: Love and Deepspace Fans Pay Tribute to Canceled Character Valko at Anime Expo
游戏.summary: One Love and Deepspace fan created a real-world tribute to Valko at Anime Expo, which quickly grew with notes and gifts from players.

科技.title: Netflix invented binge-watching. Now it may have outgrown it.
科技.summary: A new report suggests Netflix viewers aren’t sticking around for Season 2. The bigger issue may be that binge-watching itself is no longer the advantage it once was.

科技.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
科技.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's…

科技.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
科技.summary: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

科技.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
科技.summary: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.

科技.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
科技.summary: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

科技.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
科技.summary: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

科技.title: Amazon competitor Bookshop.org says Kobo eReader support will happen this year after all
科技.summary: Bookship.org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled business terms  and is working on integration.

科技.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
科技.summary: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.

科技.title: Apple brings back card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after a four-year hiatus
科技.summary: Apple has started a phased rollout of card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after adapting to the country's payments framework.

科技.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
科技.summary: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.

科技.title: Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
科技.summary: In the AI era, platforms have no choice but to fight fire with fire to cull spam.

科技.title: Canadian spy agency says it hacked drug traffickers, extremists, and a ransomware gang last year
科技.summary: The hacking operations disclosed in a Canadian spy agency's annual report underscores some pressing national security threats facing the country and its top allies.

科技.title: How to reserve and change your WhatsApp username
科技.summary: WhatsApp now lets users reserve usernames ahead of the feature’s full rollout, making it possible to connect without sharing a phone number once usernames go live.

科技.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
科技.summary: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

科技.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
科技.summary: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150 million from Meituan and Tencent at a $1 billion valuation.
